Room.title: Room
Room.description: A game room connecting a host (screen) and a controller (mobile).

hostId.description: The UID of the user who created the room.

isAccelerating.description: Whether the controller is currently pressing the gas.

controllerConnected.description: Whether a controller has joined the room.

rooms/{roomId}.description: Stores active game rooms. The roomId is a 4-digit code.
